name: Motiff
description: AI-powered professional UI design tool with built-in AI UI generation, prototyping, and developer handoff. Founded in Singapore, publicly launched in 2024 as a Figma alternative for the AI era.

seo.title: Motiff — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Motiff: AI-powered professional UI design tool with built-in AI UI generation, prototyping, and developer handoff. Founded in Singapore, publicly launched in 20

when_to_use: AI UI screen generated from text description in seconds
Figma alternative with AI features adopted by Singapore-based team
Designer and developer collaboration via built-in handoff mode
Prototype built with AI-assisted layout and auto-constraints
Design-to-code workflow accelerated with AI component generation

pros: Built-in AI UI generation goes beyond Figma AI today
Familiar Figma-like UX reduces switching cost
Prototyping and dev handoff included natively
Aggressive free tier to drive adoption
cons: Ecosystem and plugin support far behind Figma
Unclear long-term roadmap versus Figma's pace
Migrating existing Figma libraries takes real work
review.verdict: Strongest Figma-alike with integrated AI UI generation, but ecosystem gap still makes it risky for mature design orgs.
review.best_for: New design teams wanting AI-first UI workflows without full Figma commitment.
review.not_for: Large orgs deeply invested in Figma plugins, libraries, and enterprise features.
